title: Notifies Directorate of Forensic Science, Gandhi Nagar (Gujarat), in the State of Gujarat as Examiner of Electronic Evidence within India
description: Notifies Directorate of Forensic Science, Gandhi Nagar (Gujarat), in the State of Gujarat as Examiner of Electronic Evidence within India

(अ).— सूचना 灹ौ獸ोिगक琉 अिधिनयम, 2000 (2000 का 21वां) क琉 धारा 79क 獧ारा 灹द牵 शि猴य犘 का 灹योग करते 牣ए, के瀈灶 सरकार एत獵ारा 瀈यायिव榀ान िनदेशालय, गांधी नगर (गुजरात), गुजरात रा榖य को भारत म犆 िन瀓निलिखत काय榁楹े灴 के साथ इले榉灩ॉिनक सा瀣य के परी楹क के तौर पर अिधसूिचत करती है, अथा榁त : काय榁楹े灴 : (क) क瀓瀉यूटर (मीिडया) 瀈यायिव榀ान; (ख) मोबाइल उपकरण 瀈यायिव榀ान [सं. 1(13)/2015-सीएलएफ़ई] एस. गोपालकृ瀠णन, संयु猴 सिचव MINISTRY OF ELECTRONICS AND INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 26th March, 2018 S.O. 1412(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by section 79A of the Information Technology Act 2000 (21 of 2000), the Central Government hereby notifies Directorate of Forensic Science, Gandhi Nagar (Gujarat), in the State of Gujarat as Examiner of Electronic Evidence within India with the following scope, namely:- (a) Computer (Media) Forensics; (b) Mobile Devices Forensics. [No. 1(13)/2015-CLFE ] S. GOPALAKRISHNAN, Jt.
